description: Official lean 3D-MMS smoke (paper article.tex 5.2). z-extruded 2D manufactured field on the (0,1)x(0,1)x(0,0.3) slab, fixed (alpha_0,Re,Da)=(0.5,1,1), P1 velocity/pressure, both ASGS and OSGS, Deviatoric viscous operator, paper stabilization constants (c1_mult=1), structured Kuhn tets (uniform, refinement-invariant quality). Drives smoke3d.jl run_config; asserted by test/extended/mms3d_config_smoke_extended_test.jl. See docs/pending-tasks.md 2a / formulation-audit 2026-06-24 F6.

assertions.comment: Consumed by the extended guard. Rates are the FINE-segment per-method minimums; ASGS-P1 L2u is intrinsically sub-optimal (~1.2, method-intrinsic Aubin-Nitsche deficiency, audit B.1), OSGS-P1 recovers ~2. H1u is optimal (~1) for both. Thresholds carry margin below the measured structured-Kuhn rates.
